displayNameZh: 三角碎片拼合抽象 Logo
summary: Logo Triangle Form component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的三角碎片拼合抽象 Logo组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/logo-triangle-form/src/LogoTriangleForm.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `LogoTriangleForm` and `logoTriangleFormDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Logo Triangle Form Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/logo-triangle-form to my project. Preserve the exported LogoTriangleFormProps API and register the LogoTriangleForm composition with the default props.
